queue.title: About page accordion-title click scrolls to accordion-content
queue.note: Click .accordion-title → Lenis scrollTo next sibling .accordion-content with offset = -titleHeight. Expose scrollTo on RHP.lenis API. New module about-accordion-scroll.js + lenis-manager.js tweak + orchestrator wire + init.js registration. ~49 LOC, 4 files.

queue.title: Mobile nav logo tap reloads page instead of replay on homepage
queue.note: Add !(hover:hover) check before morph.replay() in orchestrator.js initNavLogoLink(). Touch devices get window.location.reload() for clean morph restart. Desktop replay unchanged. 3 LOC, 1 file.

queue.title: FG video not updating on case→case Barba transitions
queue.note: Extract _updateCaseVideos(container) helper in orchestrator.js. Reads .case-studies_wrapper fg-video/fg-video-mobile attrs, sets persistent #fg-video-wrap > .dial_fg-video src + load + play. Called from bootCurrentView (direct-land) and runAfterEnter (Barba nav). BG canvas updates automatically via startCaseBgDraw rAF loop. ~15 LOC, 1 file.

queue.title: Dial short-viewport bump: grow --dial-large to 63svh on 1440-1990 wide ≤849 tall
queue.note: CSS-only. One @media (min-width: 1440px) and (max-width: 1990px) and (max-height: 849px) block added after the default :root dial-size block in ready-hit-play.css, overriding --dial-large-width/height to 63svh. Step text 'Great stories made undeniable' actually measures 438.55px due to letter-spacing 5.63px (not the 376px the original spec assumed). At default 50svh this overflows (110% fill at 1440×800); at 63svh the dial grows to 504px and fill drops to ~87.0%. Shipped 65svh first, user requested slightly smaller on live 13" MBP review — settled on 63svh. Verify loop at 1440×800, 1440×849, 1440×850, 1440×900, 1920×1080, and 375×812 all PASS. Barba round-trip preserved via programmatic barba.go. 9 lines, one file. Barba impact: N/A (pure CSS).

queue.title: FG video preload: warm browser cache during case→home Barba leave phase
queue.note: Add _preloadFgVideos() helper in orchestrator.js. Creates hidden <video preload=auto/metadata> elements during beforeLeave for case→home. Prioritised: handoff sector + ±1 get auto, rest get metadata. Connection-gated: skip on 2g, limit on 3g. Cleanup in runAfterEnter. ~30 LOC, orchestrator.js only.

Modifies case-video-controls.js + ready-hit-play.css.

queue.title: Video sync: add playPaired(fg, bg) + waitCanPlay() helpers; replace all independent fg/bg play() calls
queue.note: Call sites: applyActive() and setDialState(ACTIVE). Both currently play fg and bg independently.

queue.title: Video sync: pause videos when not visible — IDLE pauses fgVideo+bgVideo; ACTIVE pauses genericVideo; tab hidden pauses all
queue.note: setDialState(IDLE) must pause fgVideo + bgVideo. setDialState(ACTIVE) must pause genericVideo. onVis (tab hidden) must pause all active videos and resume on return. Pool videos (poolPrev/poolNext) are exempt — they play off-screen to stay buffered. Also pause outgoing visibleVideo when demoted to pool slot after a swap.

queue.title: Video sync: dedicated RAF drift monitor — pause ahead video if |fg - bg| > threshold; only runs in ACTIVE/ENGAGED
queue.note: Replace syncFgToBg() in draw() with a separate RAF loop scoped to dialState !== IDLE. Threshold: 0.1s desktop / 0.3s mobile. Use intentionallyPaused flag to avoid fighting tab-hidden or deliberate pauses. Cancel in cleanup/destroy.

queue.title: Video sync: GSAP 0.2s crossfade on project switch in applyActive() (skip if prefers-reduced-motion)
queue.note: No crossfade on IDLE↔ACTIVE transitions — genericVideo/bgVideo opacity changes are already instant and behind the dial.

queue.title: Video sync: QA adjacent switch, non-adjacent switch, IDLE↔ACTIVE transitions, tab hidden/return, Barba return, mobile sync
queue.note: Blocked on feat-bg-video-pool. Run after BG pool implementation ships — adjacent BG switches should then be instant (pool hit), non-adjacent 0.4s crossfade.

queue.title: Video sync: re-arch to parallel video elements — N fg + N bg elements loaded simultaneously, opacity switching
queue.note: Superseded by feat-bg-video-pool (sliding-window BG pool). Closed 2026-02-27.

queue.title: BG video sliding-window pool: bgPoolPrev/bgPoolNext in applyActive + setDialState uses bgVideoRef
queue.note: ROLLED BACK: 2026.2.27.6 added a 3-rAF re-sync in playPaired to close bg decode startup lag (~50ms on Remote client project). This made things worse — the visible lag between bg loading and playing increased. Reverted to 2026.2.27.5. The residual fractional delay on Remote client is a known limitation: bg decode latency is below the 0.1s drift threshold so the monitor never corrects it. If revisiting: try lowering drift threshold to 0.05s rather than the rAF re-sync approach.

queue.title: BG video pool: QA adjacent/non-adjacent switches, IDLE↔ACTIVE blur, drift monitor, Barba cleanup

Case without controls: SVG play overlay. Viewport auto-pause preserved, auto-resume after gesture unlock. 8 tasks across home-intro.js, work-dial.js, case-video-controls.js, orchestrator.js, CSS. Streams A+B+C parallelisable.

queue.title: Dial ACTIVE→ENGAGED: use circular bounding box for proximity/hit detection instead of square

queue.title: Safari: HIT nav logo SVG appears larger than READY and PLAY
queue.note: Safari honours height="162" HTML attribute on SVG elements as the rendered height, overriding the 2rem flex container. HIT has the narrowest viewBox (316px vs 602/494), so preserveAspectRatio scaling makes its glyphs appear largest. Fix: .nav_logo-wrapper-2.is-nav svg { height: var(--logo-small-height); width: auto; } in ready-hit-play.css. CSS property beats HTML presentation attribute. Chrome unaffected.

queue.title: Optimise dial videos: re-encode fg at 720p, bg at 360p
queue.note: Background videos always shown with blur(40px) + scale(1.1) — 360p (640×360) sufficient for desktop, 270p for mobile. Foreground max render: desktop ~1632×918 CSS px (case panel 78vw×85dvh), mobile ~1125×633 CSS px (95vw×75dvh on 390px phone). Single-file approach: 720p fg + 360p bg. Per-device approach: desktop fg 720p/1080p, mobile fg 480p, desktop bg 360p, mobile bg 270p. Use H.264 MP4, CRF 23-28 (fg) / CRF 30-35 (bg), strip audio. Expected 70-80% file size reduction on bg videos.
